author: lOrm
content: Decomposed build_chat_request_body into per-provider helpers (build_chat_body_anthropic, build_chat_body_google, build_chat_body_openai_like) plus apply_anthropic_effort_level and split_messages_for_gemini/build_gemini_functions. The orchestrator is now a thin match dispatch. pipeline.rs was not touched (FORBIDDEN), and ProviderAdapter::build_chat_request_body was not added because the existing transform_request flow handles this contract.
